svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="S3 Static Website Hosting" id="s3-static-website"> <mxGraphModel dx="-599" dy="-207" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1200" pageHeight="700" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="aws-cloud" parent="1" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;gradientColor=none;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;container=1;pointerEvents=0;collapsible=0;recursiveResize=0;shape=mxgraph.aws4.group;grIcon=mxgraph.aws4.group_aws_cloud;strokeColor=#AAB7B8;fillColor=none;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=30;fontColor=#232F3E;dashed=0;" value="AWS Cloud" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="540" width="1040" x="80" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="region" parent="aws-cloud" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;gradientColor=none;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;container=1;pointerEvents=0;collapsible=0;recursiveResize=0;shape=mxgraph.aws4.group;grIcon=mxgraph.aws4.group_region;strokeColor=#00A4A6;fillColor=none;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=30;fontColor=#147EBA;dashed=1;" value="Region" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="460" width="960" x="40" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cloudfront" parent="region" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#8C4FFF;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.cloudfront;" value="CloudFront Distribution
HTTP/2+3, IPv6, HTTPS" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="60" x="120" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="oac" parent="region" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#DD344C;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.identity_and_access_management;" value="Origin Access Control
(SigV4 signed)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="60" x="360" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s3-content" parent="region" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#7AA116;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.s3_bucket;" value="S3 Content Bucket
Encrypted (AES256)
Versioned, No Public Access" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="62" width="60" x="600" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s3-logs" parent="region" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#7AA116;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.s3_bucket;" value="S3 Log Bucket
Access Logs
90-day lifecycle" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="62" width="60" x="820" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-cf-oac" edge="1" parent="region" source="cloudfront" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=11;" target="oac" value="OAC Auth (SigV4)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-oac-s3" edge="1" parent="region" source="oac" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=11;" target="s3-content" value="GetObject"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-s3-logs" edge="1" parent="region" source="s3-content" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeWidth=1;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=11;dashed=1;" target="s3-logs" value="Access Logs"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note-security" parent="region" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF4E6;strokeColor=#D79B00;align=left;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="Security Highlights:
- Origin Access Control (OAC)
- SigV4 signed requests
- No public S3 access
- HTTPS-only (TLS 1.2+)
- redirect-to-https enforced" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="260" x="120" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note-performance" parent="region" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E6F2FF;strokeColor=#0066CC;align=left;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="Performance:
- HTTP/2 and HTTP/3
- IPv6 enabled
- CachingOptimized policy
- Gzip/Brotli compression
- Custom error pages (SPA)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="260" x="420" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="user" parent="1" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#232F3D;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.user;" value="User / Browser" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="60" x="30" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-user-cf" edge="1" parent="1" source="user" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=11;" target="cloudfront" value="HTTPS"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div:
Security Highlights:
- Origin Access Control (OAC)
- SigV4 signed requests
- No public S3 access
- HTTPS-only (TLS 1.2+)
- redirect-to-https enforced

- HTTP/2 and HTTP/3
- IPv6 enabled
- CachingOptimized policy
- Gzip/Brotli compression
- Custom error pages (SPA)
